justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's time preferences throughout the conversation, including the initial vague request for "some other time, around 3 PM" and the subsequent clarification to "Wednesday afternoon, June 3rd. Around 3 PM."
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered all necessary information and booked the appointment in just three turns, without any unnecessary questions or redundant API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent successfully booking the appointment as requested without any friction points or technical jargon.
